languages.text:
The Overseer chooses an enemy he sees no farther than (Pet's MP/ 2) cells from the Mastiff. It immediately dashes to them and performs a special attack that provokes TOU Save (-5 * Pet's WS Bonus). On a failure, it deals twice as much Rending damage and applies Prone for 1 round.
Using Jump! interrupts the effect of the Apprehend! and Protect! abilities.
